Text.Page:
It's one thing after another. Not just here, but everywhere. I honestly don't know what's keeping me going anymore.

Abila has something she needs bodies for—live ones—but it's time for my daily self-medication.

You wouldn't judge if you could see the nightmares that haunt my days.

Jarald said talk to me? I guess that's as much use as he's going to be for the time being. I think he's lost all hope that we can prevail.

Your eyes show determination, though, . Perhaps your service here will make up for a certain someone's, ahem, lack of motivation.
